title: Metier D0082 On&Off 22cm Tri-Ply Stainless Steel Casserole pan with Detachable Handle Pot, 4 liters
features: Tri-Ply throughout - Three layers of metal are used to optimise this pots performance. Durable, rust and corrosion resistant 18/0 stainless steel on the outer layers protects the energy efficient super conductive Aluminium mid layer. Increasing longevity and maximising energy efficiency.
Last a lifetime - High quality and hardwearing 304 18/10 stainless steel on the inside cooking surfaces of the Casserole pot crafted to withstand the test of time!

Detachable Ergonomic Handles - The included clip on and off handles make this pan practical, safe and versatile to use, perfect for everyday cooking. Hold the pan steady, stir and feel confident cooking with the comfortable handle securely attached.

Complete with Lid - To seal in moisture each saucepan is equipped with its own tempered and vented glass lid protected by a stainless steel rim, allowing you to save energy and view your cooking without affecting the temperature.
Internal Measurement Guide - Find handy liquid lines for accurately measuring in Millilitres and Ounces, perfect for portioning.
Gas, Electric & Induction - Use the On&Off Saucepan on any hob type gas, electric, halogen, induction, radiant ring etc.

Oven Proof - Both the pan and tempered glass lid are oven safe up to 250°C /480°C Fahrenheit. Remove from the oven by attaching the handle, saving you from burnt fingers and oven gloves. (Handle is not oven proof!)
Fixed Side Handles - Act as a designated area to attach the handle. These handles are also a convenient feature making the pan easy to handle when cool and a stylish pan to serve from.
Easy to Clean + Dishwasher Safe - High quality rust resistant stainless steel cleans off easily with a wet sponge and warm water or alternatively pop all three pieces in the dishwasher.
Space Saving - Without handles getting in the way valuable space is saved in cupboards, on the cooker and when serving up at the table, perfect for small compact kitchens.
description: From the manufacturer The 22cm On&Off Casserole pot by Métier About the On&Off Casserole Pot Our 3-Ply On&Off Casserole pot can be used to cook up anything! Use it as a large saucepan or a mid-size stockpot. This pot is truly versatile... Risotto for the family, sorted! Perfect pasta prepared easily! Of course, classic casseroles will cook nicely along with stews, fitting up to 4L of goodness into each pot. A complete Tri-Ply Construction manufactured with three layers of metal to optimise performance and longevity. Ultra-durable, rust, and corrosion-resistant 18/8 stainless steel is used for the internal layer, protecting the energy-efficient superconductive Aluminium mid-layer. The outer ferrous 18/0 stainless steel enables its use on induction hobs, heating up incredibly quickly, saving energy and money. Pouring liquids out over the wide-rimmed lip is drip-free and controlled when portioning up. Fixed side handles make the pan easy to use as a serving dish. Place a trivet underneath and you can cook to serve in this pan. Simply press the patented detachable handle’s textured thumb grip to release, then click into place for safe and secure carrying. Clip off when not in use, to create more space on the stove, table, or cupboards. On&Off Saucepan On&Off Casserole Pot On&Off Sauté Pan Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 5.0 out of 5 stars 3 — 4.8 out of 5 stars 7 Material 304 Stainless Steel Tri-Ply Stainless Steel Aluminium & Stainless Steel Internal Diameter 18cm 22cm 28cm Internal Capacity 2.25L 4L 2.8L Includes Glass Lid ✓ ✓ ✓ Includes Handle ✓ ✓ ✓ Suitable on All Hob Types ✓ ✓ ✓ Induction Ready ✓ ✓ ✓ Non-Stick no data no data ✓ Oven Safe (250°c) ✓ ✓ ✓ Dishwasher Safe ✓ ✓ ✓ About the On&Off Detachable Handle Collection On&Off Set The On&Off range's detachable handles made of high-quality 304 18/10 stainless steel are interchangeable, clipping on to whichever pan you need to use. Space Saving Save space by storing with the handles detached and pans stacked inside each other. We recommend padding between each pan with a tea towel or felt spacer. For Safe Use Our convenient handle is designed to reduce the need for oven gloves and save you from burnt fingers when cooking. Tempered & Vented Glass lid Seal in moisture while watching your food as it's cooking. Each pan includes an oven-proof tempered & vented glass lid protected by a stainless steel glass rim. The Growing On&Off Family At Métier, we endeavor to continue releasing high-quality & innovative cookware products. Watch this space as our On&Off detachable handle cookware range expands!
